\tzpentry{ID4504}{Wavefunction Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4504 introduces Wavefunction Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \|\psi_n - \psi_\infty\| < C\,e^{-n!}\,n^{-\alpha}, \end{equation}
